airport.name: Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 10 to city center, or use airport buses. Taxis available.

transport.metro: Use metro apps for maps. Operates 6:30 AM to 10:30 PM.
transport.taxi: Use metered taxis. Apps like Didi recommended for convenience.
transport.didi: Download Didi app, set to English. Pay via app.
tips: Get a transit card for ease.

payment.alipay: Download Alipay international version, link foreign card.
payment.wechatPay: Set up WeChat Pay with foreign card verification.
payment.cash: Carry small bills, as change may be scarce.
payment.foreignCard: Accepted in major hotels and stores, but mobile pay preferred.

tips: Book in advance, especially during festivals.
Check reviews for cleanliness and location.

commonScams: Tea house scams with high prices.

emergency.localTip: For medical help, go to major hospitals like West China Hospital.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (March-May) and autumn (Sept-Nov) for mild weather.
